data.content: Implementation review approved. Commit 9c664af3 removes all OpenRouter code (4084 deletions across 39 files) and replaces with OpenCode CLI integration. Key changes verified: terminal-manager.ts OpenRouter runtime removed, orchestration-manager.ts and breakdown-manager.ts fallback changed to claude, local-worker.ts BLOCKED_SHELL_COMMANDS updated. Code pushed to main, quality gates passed (tsc, lint, 1855 tests, build).
